detail.description:
Last Day on Earth is a zombie survival action game with base building, crafting, and shooting zombies in a brutal post-apocalyptic world. Your life depends on how well you loot, craft, and build, turning whatever you find into weapons, gear, and a fortified shelter. Explore hostile lands, shoot zombies, and fight to protect everything you’ve worked for. In this zombie survival world, every piece of loot matters, every wall you build matters, and every mistake may be your last.

■ CRAFTING & BASE
detail.recentChanges:
— Let's celebrate LDoE's 9th anniversary with the Metal & Mud event! Complete Genesis's tasks, drive around the bogs on an ATV, and crush everything on your path.
— New ATV modules: Launchable Winch, Turret, Steel Tracks, and Ram
— Cats and kittens: Crossbreed the best cats out of 10 breeds and 13 coat colors
— New food for kittens
— Caiman Farm. These ain't your friendly turkeys!
— New sulfur and lead extractors
— Broken Down ATV Engine that you can disassemble to find goodies inside
